2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a new FUSE_IO_URING_CMD_ADD_QUEUE command to the Linux kernel's fuse module, allowing servers to create queues explicitly and decoupling queue setup from entry registration. This change is necessary for the introduction of buffer pools, which require existing queues to be created first. The patch modifies the fuse_ring_queue creation logic to handle explicit queue creation and adds a new function fuse_uring_add_queue to handle this command.
